prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register-stage primary_segment_1)
(assign-escort-asset-to-stage primary_segment_1 escort_asset_1)
(attach-objective-to-stage primary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(confirm-stage-objective primary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(attach-support-npc-to-stage primary_segment_1 support_npc_1)

(attach-objective-to-stage secondary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(confirm-stage-objective secondary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(activate-checkpoint-for-secondary-segment secondary_segment_1 checkpoint_variant_1 objective_condition_1)
(assign-resource-token-to-secondary-segment secondary_segment_1 checkpoint_variant_1 resource_token_1)
(process-secondary-segment-checkpoint-and-resource secondary_segment_1 checkpoint_variant_1 objective_condition_1 resource_token_1)
(assemble-stage-token primary_segment_1 secondary_segment_1 checkpoint_1 checkpoint_variant_1 stage_token_1)
(rollback-stage-objective-binding secondary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(attach-objective-to-stage primary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(validate-stage-token stage_token_1 primary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(mark-primary-segment-completion primary_segment_1 stage_token_1)
(mark-secondary-segment-completion secondary_segment_1 stage_token_1)
(assign-mission-tag-to-stage primary_segment_1 mission_tag_1 objective_condition_1)
(finalize-primary-segment-completion-with-tag primary_segment_1 escort_asset_1 mission_tag_1)
(rollback-stage-objective-binding primary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(attach-objective-to-stage secondary_segment_1 objective_condition_1)
(assign-mission-tag-to-stage secondary_segment_1 mission_tag_1 objective_condition_1)
(finalize-secondary-segment-completion-with-tag secondary_segment_1 escort_asset_2 mission_tag_1)
(detach-support-npc-from-stage primary_segment_1 support_npc_1)
(register-stage stage_instance_1)
(assign-escort-asset-to-stage stage_instance_1 escort_asset_1)
(attach-objective-to-stage stage_instance_1 objective_condition_1)
(confirm-stage-objective stage_instance_1 objective_condition_1)
(register-deliverable-on-instance stage_instance_1 deliverable_item_1 stage_token_1)
(verify-deliverable-for-instance stage_instance_1 deliverable_item_1 stage_token_1 objective_condition_1)
(assign-resource-a-to-instance stage_instance_1 resource_type_a_1)
(attach-support-npc-to-stage stage_instance_1 support_npc_1)
(advance-optional-modifier-stage stage_instance_1 resource_type_a_1 support_npc_1 deliverable_item_1 stage_token_1)
(assign-resource-b-to-instance stage_instance_1 resource_type_b_1)
(enable-modifier-finalization-phase-one stage_instance_1 resource_type_b_1 deliverable_item_1 stage_token_1)
(apply-finalization-precheck stage_instance_1)
(assign-mission-tag-to-stage stage_instance_1 mission_tag_1 objective_condition_1)
(finalize-instance-completion-with-tag stage_instance_1 escort_asset_1 mission_tag_1)
(rollback-stage-objective-binding stage_instance_1 objective_condition_1)
(detach-support-npc-from-stage stage_instance_1 support_npc_1)
(unassign-resource-a-from-instance stage_instance_1 resource_type_a_1)
(unassign-resource-b-from-instance stage_instance_1 resource_type_b_1)
(register-stage stage_instance_2)
(assign-escort-asset-to-stage stage_instance_2 escort_asset_2)
(attach-objective-to-stage stage_instance_2 objective_condition_1)
(confirm-stage-objective stage_instance_2 objective_condition_1)
(register-deliverable-on-instance stage_instance_2 deliverable_item_2 stage_token_1)
(verify-deliverable-for-instance stage_instance_2 deliverable_item_2 stage_token_1 objective_condition_1)
(assign-resource-a-to-instance stage_instance_2 resource_type_a_1)
(attach-support-npc-to-stage stage_instance_2 support_npc_1)
(advance-optional-modifier-stage stage_instance_2 resource_type_a_1 support_npc_1 deliverable_item_2 stage_token_1)
(assign-resource-b-to-instance stage_instance_2 resource_type_b_1)
(enable-modifier-finalization-phase-one stage_instance_2 resource_type_b_1 deliverable_item_2 stage_token_1)
(apply-finalization-precheck stage_instance_2)
(assign-mission-tag-to-stage stage_instance_2 mission_tag_1 objective_condition_1)
(finalize-instance-completion-with-tag stage_instance_2 escort_asset_2 mission_tag_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem is complex with many objects and actions. The goal is to complete four stages: primary_segment_1, secondary_segment_1, stage_instance_1, and stage_instance_2.


## Identifying Problem Components  
- The task involves multiple stages: primary_segment_1, secondary_segment_1, stage_instance_1, and stage_instance_2.  
- Each stage likely represents a distinct part of the overall process, with specific objects and actions to handle.  
- The goal is to complete all four stages, suggesting a structured, sequential approach.  

## Noting Initial Conditions  
- Start by understanding the initial state before proceeding with the stages.  
- This initial state will likely influence how the stages are executed or prioritized.

## Examining Resource Constraints  
- Shared components like stage_token_1 and resource_token_1 limit simultaneous actions across stages.  
- Only one objective_condition_1 is available, requiring careful allocation across multiple stages.  

## Planning Stage Execution  
- Register all stages first: primary_segment_1, secondary_segment_1, stage_instance_1, and stage_instance_2, as none are initially registered.  
- Process primary_segment_1 and secondary_segment_1 first, assembling stage_token before handling instances, due to shared dependencies.  

## Analyzing Stage Dependencies  
- Completing primary_segment_1 requires engaging it, validating objectives, and triggering checkpoints, using actions like assign_escort_asset_to_stage.  
- Assembling stage_token needs both segments engaged, checkpoints triggered, and segments ready, creating a sequential dependency.  

## Addressing Trigger Conditions  
- Trigger_condition_2 exists but is not initially available, unlike trigger_condition_1, which may affect stage readiness.  
- Need to check if trigger_condition_2 becomes necessary for later stages or can be bypassed.

## Exploring Modifier Attachments  
- Modifiers need to be attached using verify_deliverable_for_instance or apply_optional_modifier_with_token, ensuring instance validation and deliverable binding.  
- Optional modifiers require additional steps like attach_optional_modifier_to_instance, making them available for assignment.  

## Managing Resource Allocation  
- Limited resources like one stage_token_1 and one resource_token_1 require careful assignment across primary_segment_1 and secondary_segment_1.  
- Rollback options like rollback_stage_objective_binding allow reassigning objective_condition_1 if needed, given only one is available.  

## Outlining Segment Completion  
- For primary_segment_1, register the stage, assign escort_asset_1, attach objective_condition_1, and use support_npc_1 to engage and make ready.  
- For secondary_segment_1, consider using resource_token_1 instead, as support_npc_1 is already assigned, requiring a different asset strategy.

## Finalizing Segment Completion  
- After assembling stage_token_1 and validating it, mark primary_segment_1 and secondary_segment_1 as completion_ready using mark_primary_segment_completion and mark_secondary_segment_completion.  
- Use mission_tag_1 to assign to primary_segment_1 first, finalize with escort_asset_1, then repeat for secondary_segment_1 with escort_asset_2 after reassigning objective_condition_1.  

## Managing Objective Reassignment  
- Rollback objective_condition_1 from primary_segment_1 after finalizing to make it available for secondary_segment_1 using rollback_stage_objective_binding.  
- Attach objective_condition_1 to secondary_segment_1, ensuring it meets prerequisites like completion_ready before assigning mission_tag_1.  

## Preparing for Instance Completion  
- With primary_segment_1 and secondary_segment_1 completed, focus on stage_instance_1 and stage_instance_2, which share the now-completed segments and validated stage_token_1.  
- Register instances, assign available assets like escort_asset_3, and validate objectives, leveraging assets released from completed segments.

## Verifying Instance Requirements  
- For stage_instance_2, verify_deliverable_for_instance needs stage_objective_assigned with objective_condition_1.  
- Registering deliverable on stage_instance_2 requires instance_has_stage_token, confirmed with stage_token_1 already assembled and validated.  

## Managing Optional Modifiers  
- Optional_modifier_1 and _2 remain unused, with bonus not applied and trigger_condition_1 not used in this path.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
